notes: Agorapulse offers a 30-day free trial with no credit card required. Annual billing provides up to 20% savings. All tiers include AI features such as AI Writing Assistant and AI alt text generator. The Custom tier is marketed for 'large teams or enterprises with complex needs' and requires contacting sales. Pricing is per user per month. The company also offers add-ons like Advanced Listening and Advocacy which require booking a demo for pricing.

notes: AdRoll uses dynamic pricing based on CPM (cost per thousand impressions). Minimum daily spend of $5 and minimum daily budget of $10 required to launch campaigns. No specific dollar amounts are published on the pricing page. Managed Services and Advanced Package require contacting sales. Self-Service Ads tier is pay-as-you-go with optional add-ons for cross-channel attribution and social ads. Account-Based Retargeting package has no upfront fee and charges only for media spend.

ai_feature_names: MetadataONE - LLM integration for conversational campaign planning

notes: Metadata.io does not display public pricing on their website. All pricing appears to be custom and requires contacting sales via 'Book a Demo' or similar contact methods. The platform is heavily AI-driven with multiple AI agents embedded in the core product offering. Key AI features include automated bidding, audience targeting, performance analysis, and creative generation. MetadataONE, an upcoming LLM integration feature, will enable conversational campaign management.

Concierge and Agency tiers require contacting sales for custom pricing.

notes: Pricing page does not display public pricing information. The page offers a 14-day free trial and prompts users to 'Get a demo' or 'Try for free' with contact sales option for special requests. No tier names, prices, or feature breakdowns by pricing level are provided on the page.

tiers.name: Customer Data Pipeline (Connections)
key_features: Govern data for quality and compliance

notes: Segment (part of Twilio) does not publish specific pricing on their page. Customer Data Pipeline (Connections) has a 14-day free trial but specific pricing must be obtained by contacting sales. The full Customer Data Platform requires contacting sales for custom pricing. AI capabilities (predictions, recommendations, generative audiences) are included in CDP plans or available as add-ons for the Connections/Customer Data Pipeline tier. Monthly tracked users (MTUs) are used as the primary usage metric.

mParticle uses a consumption-based, value-based pricing model with universal credits. No public pricing tiers available. Customers must contact sales for custom quotes and rate cards. Pricing is based on pre-purchased credit volume with volume discounts. More credits purchased upfront results in lower unit rates. No monthly event or user caps, no overages or penalties. AI features (Predictive Audiences, Predictive Attributes) are included in the platform without feature-gating.

free_tier.name: Free
free_tier.limitations: 250,000 monthly events, 5 JavaScript transformations, 1 tracking plan, 10 team members, 10 reverse ETL connections, community Slack support only

notes: RudderStack uses a usage-based pricing model based on monthly events. The Starter tier is listed at $220/month for 1 million monthly events. Growth and Enterprise tiers require contacting sales for custom pricing. Overage fees apply for exceeding event limits on paid plans. Python Transformations are available in Growth and Enterprise tiers. Profiles, Data Apps, and advanced features like Propensity Scores and Attribution are available in Growth and Enterprise tiers. No AI features are explicitly mentioned in the pricing page.
The provided raw text appears to be encoded image data (PNG format) rather than readable pricing page text. No pricing information could be extracted.

free_tier.name: Developer
free_tier.limitations: 2M credits per month, up to 10 domains, basic support, web-only identity stitching, limited data retention (6 months in comparison tier), no custom schema management, no real-time profiles, no server-side connectors, no copilot features

tiers.name: Growth
key_features: Web + offline sync to ad networks

notes: Lytics uses a credit-based usage model where 1 credit = 1 profile update from inbound events, and Cloud Connect sync events consume 0.5 credits per updated row. Growth tier starts at $500/month for base allocation and can scale with additional credits. Developer tier includes 10M free credits bonus when upgrading to a paid package. Overages are handled differently by tier: Enterprise works with customers; Growth auto-enrolls in higher credit models; Developer throttles at cap. Company was acquired by Contentstack.

free_tier.name: Basic Reverse ETL

notes: Fivetran uses a usage-based pricing model with separate cost curves for connections, transformations, and activations. Pricing is based on Monthly Active Rows (MAR) and Monthly Model Runs (MMR). A $5 base charge applies to connections with 1-1M MAR usage on Standard plan and above. Customers can save up to 22% with annual contracts. Enterprise License Agreements (ELAs) offer fixed pricing with unlimited consumption. The page mentions 'Data readiness for AI' as a solution but does not list specific AI features in the pricing tiers.
